asset_ref_resolution: template artifact refs are emitted relative to this docs examples directory; medical_display_gallery_assets is copied with the PDF so Markdown and browser readers can resolve images

items.title: Kaplan-Meier survival with risk table
items.replacement_reason: MAS current canonical template is grouped Kaplan-Meier evidence; keep PDF reference id as external source id.

items.title: ROC curve with model comparison
items.replacement_reason: MAS current canonical template names the binary ROC curve surface; roc_auc remains a source renderer id.

items.title: Cox/effect forest plot
items.replacement_reason: MAS current canonical template generalizes Cox forest to effect forest while preserving the LidocaineQ source renderer.

items.title: Distribution comparison violin-box
items.replacement_reason: PDF reference id is preserved as LidocaineQ source id; MAS current canonical template replaces the retired duplicate alias.

items.title: Stacked proportion bars
items.replacement_reason: PDF reference id is preserved as LidocaineQ source id; MAS current canonical template replaces the retired duplicate alias.

items.title: Scatter correlation panel
items.replacement_reason: PDF reference id is preserved as LidocaineQ source id; MAS current canonical template replaces the retired duplicate alias.

items.title: Embedding scatter
items.replacement_reason: One LidocaineQ embedding reference covers MAS current PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP computed-workflow templates; do not add a duplicate external-id alias.

items.title: ComplexHeatmap annotated matrix
items.replacement_reason: MAS current canonical template names the group-comparison heatmap surface; heatmap remains the external source renderer id.

items.title: Differential-expression volcano
items.replacement_reason: MAS current canonical template names the omics volcano panel surface; volcano_deg remains the source renderer id.

items.title: Pathway enrichment dotplot
items.replacement_reason: MAS current canonical template names the pathway enrichment dotplot surface; gsea_enrichment remains the source renderer id.

items.title: Mutation landscape oncoplot
items.replacement_reason: MAS current canonical template names the genomic alteration landscape surface; oncoplot_mutation remains the source renderer id.

items.title: Ranked risk-score waterfall
items.replacement_reason: PDF reference id is preserved as LidocaineQ source id; MAS current canonical template replaces the retired duplicate alias.

items.title: Subtype transition alluvial
items.replacement_reason: PDF reference id is preserved as LidocaineQ source id; MAS current canonical template replaces the retired duplicate alias.

items.title: Radial immune/pathology profile
items.replacement_reason: PDF reference id is preserved as LidocaineQ source id; MAS current canonical template replaces the retired duplicate alias.

items.title: Baseline summary table
items.replacement_reason: MAS current canonical template keeps Table 1 semantics and uses a Gallery-only R preview for the LidocaineQ baseline table reference.

policy.purpose: Page-level composition recipes for medical manuscript figures. They organize a small set of evidence primitives into claim-led figure pages instead of adding duplicate single-plot templates.
policy.learned_from: Yuan1z0825/nature-skills/skills/nature-figure page-level figure contract, common patterns, design theory, and QA workflow

recipes.title: Clinical Prediction Triptych
recipes.intent: Show discrimination, calibration, and clinical utility as one coherent model-performance figure page.
recipes.label_strategy: directly label model curves when legend would crowd; keep thresholds near curves

recipes.title: Model Validation Dashboard
recipes.intent: Summarize predictive model robustness, calibration, explanation, complexity, subgroup behavior, and threshold governance without duplicating single-plot templates.
recipes.guide_strategy: reuse model/cohort palette roles; direct labels for feature lists when legends crowd
recipes.label_strategy: prioritize direct cohort, subgroup, and feature labels over repeated legends

recipes.title: Schematic-led Composite
recipes.intent: Start with a mechanism, workflow, or study-design schematic and attach the minimal quantitative panels needed to support the claim.
recipes.guide_strategy: use shared visual vocabulary in the schematic; quantitative panels keep article palette roles
recipes.label_strategy: panel labels and callouts explain flow; evidence panels use direct data labels only when needed

recipes.title: Image Plate plus Quantification
recipes.intent: Combine representative biomedical image panels with programmatic quantification and scale/channel labeling.
recipes.guide_strategy: keep image channels and quantitative palettes semantically separate
recipes.label_strategy: scale bars and channel labels on images; concise axes and direct group labels on quant panels

recipes.title: Asymmetric Genomics Figure
recipes.intent: Give molecular or multi-omic structure a dominant pattern panel and use smaller panels for consequence, enrichment, or clinical association.
recipes.guide_strategy: fixed matrix palette roles and shared annotation legends; avoid per-panel color drift
recipes.label_strategy: label only selected genes/pathways; group dense labels into annotation tracks

recipes.title: Single-cell or Spatial Atlas Storyboard
recipes.intent: Organize atlas-level state geometry, marker evidence, composition, trajectory, or spatial context into a readable multi-panel figure.
recipes.guide_strategy: shared cluster palette and direct labels for key states; separate continuous feature colorbars
recipes.label_strategy: label major states on the embedding; keep marker labels readable and sparse

composition_gallery_surface.storyboard_preview_policy: visual storyboards show page-level organization using current evidence primitive thumbnails and placeholders; they are not paper-local data results

language_package_requirements.name: jsonlite
language_package_requirements.role: render request and structured reporting-flow JSON IO

language_package_requirements.name: dplyr
language_package_requirements.role: ggconsort cohort data manipulation and plotting helpers

language_package_requirements.name: ggconsort
language_package_requirements.role: mature CONSORT/STROBE-style cohort participant flow grammar
